fields.label: Write-Allowed DocTypes
fields.description: AI Bot is DENIED write/create/delete on every DocType except those listed here. Add a DocType to let the AI Bot write it (e.g. AI Bot Page). Everything else is read-only for the AI Bot, enforced at the permission-hook level.

fields.label: Protected DocTypes
fields.description: Every bench migrate wipes all AI Bot DocPerm / Custom DocPerm rows and re-adds them fresh, so rows pointing at deleted doctypes don't linger. DocTypes listed below are SKIPPED by both the wipe and the re-add — their AI Bot rows are left exactly as you customized them.
